acceptance_criteria: mutation-audit contains compact and clear request_worker_compact records with effect.dry_run true and effect.sent false.
Cleanup leaves no active disposable sessions or scenario-prefixed tmux sessions.
guidelines: Use --dry-run only for compact and clear.
Do not ask the worker to edit files, commit, open PRs, install packages, or run real compact/clear.
manager_config.objective: Verify dry-run compact/clear mutation-audit effect metadata only.

name: qa-compact-clear-audit-receipt
summary: Live-verify dry-run compact/clear mutation-audit effect records.

next_steps: Manager should enable compact/clear permission, record nudge decisions, run request-worker-compact with --dry-run for /compact and /clear, then verify mutation-audit effect metadata.

payload.risk: accidental real compact or clear avoided by --dry-run

worker_handoff.summary: Disposable QA worker reported status-only readiness for dry-run compact/clear audit verification; no file edits, installs, commits, PRs, /compact, or /clear actions performed.
